name: spotify-search-provider
description: Spotify Search Provider for GNOME Shell 49

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && npm run compile-schemas && mkdir -p ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/spotify-search@yourname.example.com/schemas && cp extension.js prefs.js metadata.json schemas/gschemas.compiled ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/spotify-search@yourname.example.com/ && cp schemas/*.xml ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/spotify-search@yourname.example.com/schemas/
